ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Nov-15-2004 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: No appearance. The court having reviewed the file finds no good cause or substancial justification for plaintiff's failure to comply with the court's orders and rules. Therefore, It is hereby ordered that this matter is dismissed. The court finds that a less severe sanction would not be effective due to the history of lack of compliance. Proceedings reported by: Brenda Fields (212)
